name: Favorite Mustard Pickles
recipeInstructions:
1. Finely chop or grind cucumbers, onions, and red peppers separately in a food chopper. Rinse the chopper between each vegetable.
2. Put gherkins, peeled pearl onions, and cauliflower florets into separate bowls.
3. Sprinkle ¼ cup salt on each bowl of vegetables.
4. Cover all vegetables with cold water and let stand overnight.
5. Drain the chopped vegetables in a colander; drain whole vegetables and dry them with a towel.
6. Mix the drained vegetables in a preserving kettle, stir in 6 cups vinegar and sugar until boiling.
7. Combine flour, mustard, turmeric, and celery salt to form a smooth paste with remaining vinegar.
8. Gradually stir the paste into the vegetable mixture; continue stirring until slightly thickened.
9. Pack the pickles into jars and seal immediately.
Makes 6 quarts.
